dimensions.label: Model inputs
dimensions.description: Features, signals, and constraints feeding each prediction or recommendation.

dimensions.label: Model outputs
dimensions.description: Scores, rankings, allocations, and confidence surfaced to operators.

dimensions.label: Adoption
dimensions.description: How often recommendations are accepted, deferred, or ignored over time.

dimensions.label: Overrides
dimensions.description: Manual changes, policy exceptions, and human-in-the-loop corrections.

dimensions.label: Performance
dimensions.description: Model accuracy, drift, latency, and stability against benchmarks.

dimensions.label: Exceptions
dimensions.description: Out-of-policy cases, data quality issues, and operational alerts.

dimensions.label: Actions
dimensions.description: Decisions taken, workflows triggered, and downstream system responses.

dimensions.label: Business impact
dimensions.description: Revenue, cost, service level, and outcome lift attributed to the system.
